channel.title: Tops on V4ler1an Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Tops on V4ler1an Blog

item.description: V4ler1an is a security researcher. He has a solid experience in the Windows and Linux security for more than 3 years. Throughout his career, he has built a number of tools for Windows security research, most of them are still update. He loves open source and has been contributing to a variety of open source projects, he think freedom is the last goal. He also has strong interests in various tech stuff such as Artificial Intelligence, Cryptocurrencies, Smart Home.
Machine learning学习笔记 Coursera 在线课程 Machine learning 笔记讲师: 吴恩达(Andrew Ng) 课程地址：https://www.coursera.org/lear
